summary: A skincare product ingredient checker app. Users can input ingredients and the app evaluates whether they are good or bad for skin, along with a compatibility rate. The ingredient database needs to be expanded with more ingredients and accurate skin-suitability ratings.
architectural_notes: Ingredient evaluation logic must distinguish harmful/irritating ingredients (e.g., alcohol, sodium) as bad for skin rather than defaulting to 'suitable'
known_issues: Ingredient checker returns incorrect results — harmful ingredients like alcohol and sodium are incorrectly rated as 'suitable for skin'

existing_features.title: Add a compatibility rate score to the ingredient analysis result. When a user submits a list of ingredients, compute and display an overall compatibility score (0–100%) based on the ratio and severity of harmful vs. beneficial ingredients detected. Display this score prominently in the IngredientAnalysis component alongside a label (e.g., 'Compatibility Rate: 72% — Moderate').

Update the ProductSuitabilityCheckerPage and IngredientAnalysis frontend components to correctly display per-ingredient safety verdicts ('Good for Skin', 'Caution', 'Bad for Skin / Avoid') using color-coded badges that reflect the updated backend classifications. Ensure the UI no longer shows false 'Suitable' results for known harmful ingredients.

new_feature_requests.summary: Expand ingredient database with more ingredients and accurate good/bad-for-skin classifications and compatibility ratings

Fix the ingredient safety classification logic so that known harmful or irritating ingredients (e.g., alcohol/ethanol, sodium lauryl sulfate, sodium laureth sulfate, fragrance, parabens, formaldehyde, etc.) are correctly classified as 'Bad for skin', 'Irritant', or 'Avoid' rather than 'Suitable'. Each ingredient must have an accurate skin-suitability verdict based on dermatological consensus.

Expand the backend ingredient database (ingredient-store.mo / main.mo) with a comprehensive list of at least 60 common skincare ingredients, each with accurate safety classifications covering: known irritants/harmful (alcohol denat, ethanol, sodium lauryl sulfate, sodium laureth sulfate, fragrance/parfum, methylparaben, propylparaben, formaldehyde, toluene, oxybenzone, triclosan, phthalates, mineral oil, petrolatum, coal tar, hydroquinone, synthetic dyes), caution ingredients (salicylic acid, retinol, benzoyl peroxide, alpha hydroxy acids, glycolic acid, lactic acid, citric acid, isopropyl alcohol), and beneficial/safe ingredients (hyaluronic acid, niacinamide, ceramides, glycerin, vitamin C/ascorbic acid, vitamin E/tocopherol, aloe vera, green tea extract, centella asiatica, squalane, jojoba oil, rosehip oil, zinc oxide, titanium dioxide, allantoin, panthenol/vitamin B5, ferulic acid, azelaic acid, peptides, collagen, elastin, shea butter, argan oil, tea tree oil, kojic acid, resveratrol, bakuchiol, sea buckthorn, licorice root extract, chamomile extract, oat extract/colloidal oatmeal, sodium PCA, trehalose, beta-glucan, marine collagen, coenzyme Q10/ubiquinone).
